title: Tests for Address Management and Order Tracking
description: Write unit and integration tests for addresses and tracking
requirements: Unit tests: DeliveryAddressService (default address logic, validation)
Integration tests: /users/me/addresses endpoints (create, list, update, delete, set-default)
Unit tests: tracking URL generation for all providers
Unit tests: Celery task poll_delivery_statuses (mock provider APIs)
E2E test: user creates address, selects it at checkout, order is created with address
E2E test: order status updates, tracking button appears
acceptance_criteria: All API endpoints covered with integration tests
Webhook logic tested with mock payloads
Tracking URL generation tested for all 4 providers
